title: Wandering Trades
body:
Have you ever wished that wandering traders where less useless? well no need to wish anymore, because that is exactly what this mod does, adding 30 new wandering trader trades, 3 advancements related to wandering traders

![Wandering Trader](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f5c6349a0eb1ffcb2c3770e59349292b8c9955a.png)
